episodes.title: What everyone is missing: Carbon Nation Cults + Abuse
episodes.description:
Cult dynamics are coercive control at scale. In Episode 2 of this series I get personal,  sharing the moment in therapy when I saw myself in the Power and Control Wheel, and connect that framework to Velvet's story inside Carbon Nation. If you haven't watched Episode 1 yet, start there first. Episode 3 is an interview with Jenae Newell, the woman who sent Nature Boy to prison for life. Subscribe so you don't miss it.

IN THIS EPISODE
00:05 Therapy Wake Up Call
01:17 Power and Control Wheel
02:36 Naming the Abuse
06:20 Abuse Is Strategy
07:07 Systems Have Exits
08:26 Meet Velvet
10:25 Leaving Can Be Deadly
16:36 Teacher to Messiah Shift
16:53 Mystical Manipulation
27:38 Proxy Violence by Design
31:21 Reactive Abuse Explained
33:33 Believe Women Framework
34:46 Closing and Next Episode

MY BOOK

https://www.amazon.com/Unruly-Guide-Reclaiming-Your-True/dp/B0D8LJXFSD

JOIN ME IN COLOMBIA

If you are in immediate danger call 911.

CONTENT WARNING
This series contains discussions of sexual assault, physical violence, coercive control, psychological abuse, financial abuse, revenge pornography, child loss, and death.

episodes.title: Nature Boy's Carbon Nation: The System That Controlled Them All
episodes.description:
Cult dynamics are coercive control at scale. In Episode 1 I break down exactly how Nature Boy built Carbon Nation — a system of control that operated across 9 countries, destroyed lives, and sent a man who called himself God to prison for life. This is not just a cult story. This is a blueprint that shows up in relationships everywhere.

IN THIS EPISODE
00:00 Intro
00:05 The Slap Moment
01:14 Why This Story Matters
03:04 Trial and BITE Model
04:41 Cult Dynamics Everywhere
06:11 Carbon Nation Recap
10:48 Deaths and Fallout
12:48 The Case That Brought the Conviction
13:56 Abuse Is a Choice
17:59 Behavior Control
21:52 Information Control
23:48 Thought Control and Doubt
26:07 Emotional Control and Love Bombing
29:42 The Manosphere Pipeline
